mapper.insert: insert into note_collection (user_id,note_id,create_time,status) values(#{userId},#{noteId},#{createTime},#{status}) on duplicate key update create_time =#{createTime} ,status=#{status}
mapper.select: select count(1) from note_collection where user_id=#{userId} and note_id=#{noteId} and status=1 limit 1
select note_id from note_collection where user_id=#{userId} and status=1
select count(1) from note_collection where user_id =#{userId} and note_id=#{noteId} and status=1 limit 1
